faq.meta_description: Find answers about BonPlanInfos.net, the African event platform, monetization and real profits with only 5% commission
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quickly find answers about our African event platform

general.title: General Questions about BonPlanInfos
general.a1: BonPlanInfos.net is the first African platform dedicated to events and their monetization. We offer event organizers, artists, cultural promoters and entrepreneurs professional tools to create, manage and monetize their activities with only 5% platform commission.
general.q2: How is the platform different from others?
general.a2: Our difference: Ultra-low 5% commission (you keep 95%), focus on Africa, guaranteed real payments, and complete suite of tools (ticketing, voting, raffles, stand rental). We are not just a platform, but a concrete business opportunity.
general.a3: Our platform is designed for: Event organizers, Cultural promoters, Artists and managers, Associations, Schools, Fair and exhibition managers. Any creator wanting to monetize their event activities in Africa.
general.a4: Absolutely! We use: Secure tickets with QR codes, Encrypted payments, Day-of verification scan, Fraud protection. Invalid tickets are automatically rejected, guaranteeing the authenticity of each participant.
general.q5: How do I create an organizer account?
general.a5: To create your account: 1) Register for free on the platform, 2) Complete your organizer profile, 3) Accept our organizer contract, 4) Start creating your events. If you have any difficulties, contact our support via WhatsApp: +225 0712275374.
general.q6: What are the terms and conditions?
general.a6: By creating an account, you accept our Organizer Contract which states: You are solely responsible for your events, we are a technical service provider. The commission is 5%, withdrawals are simple, and you keep 95% of your revenue. Download the full contract from your dashboard.
general.q7: How do payments and withdrawals work?
general.a7: Payments: Collected via local means (mobile money, cards). Withdrawals: Available on your organizer account. Commission: 5% deducted from each participation. Example: For 1,000,000 FCFA in sales → You receive 950,000 FCFA, we take 50,000 FCFA.
general.q8: Where can I get help or support?
general.a8: Several channels: 1) WhatsApp Support: +225 0712275374, 2) Email: support@bonplaninfos.net, 3) Live chat on the platform. Response within 24h.

features.title: Features and Services
features.q1: How does online ticket sales work?
features.a1: Our ticketing system: 1) Create your event with details and prices, 2) Generate unique tickets with QR code, 3) Share the link on social networks, 4) Participants buy online, 5) Scan QR on the day for validation. Commission: only 5%, you keep 95%.
features.a2: Yes! Our voting system allows: Real-time elections, Interactive rankings, Unique link per candidate, Results visible instantly. Example: Revenue 500,000 FCFA → You receive 475,000 FCFA, commission 25,000 FCFA.
features.q3: How do I organize raffles and draws?
features.a3: Raffle feature: 1) Set up your game, 2) Sell participation tickets, 3) Live transparent draw, 4) Participants see winners in real time. Example: 200,000 FCFA revenue → 190,000 FCFA for you, 10,000 FCFA commission.
features.q4: How do I rent stands for events?
features.a4: Stand rental system: 1) List your available stands, 2) Set prices and conditions, 3) Online booking, 4) Professional organization, 5) Less hassle on the day. Example: 1,000,000 FCFA → You keep 950,000 FCFA.
features.q5: How can I boost my business visibility?
features.a5: 'Discover' section: 1) Add your business with photos and descriptions, 2) Increase your traffic, 3) Boost your events by choosing a boost pack, 4) Attract more visitors.
features.q6: What types of events can I organize?
features.a6: All types: Concerts and shows, Conferences and seminars, Cultural festivals, Sports events, Trade exhibitions, Private events, Workshops and training. The platform adapts to your needs.
features.q7: Can I protect my event poster?
features.a7: Yes! Exclusive feature: 1) Publish your poster on the platform, 2) Copy the secure link, 3) Share on social networks, 4) Monetize views and engagements. Your content remains protected while being widely distributed.
features.q8: Are there limits on transactions or events?
features.a8: No limits! You can: Organize as many events as you want, Sell an unlimited number of tickets, Manage multiple events simultaneously, Make daily withdrawals if needed. Only limit: comply with our terms of use.

partnerships.title: Licenses and Partnerships
partnerships.q1: How do I become a BonPlanInfos dealer?
partnerships.a1: Becoming a dealer: 1) Choose your level (City, Region, Country), 2) Contact us to apply, 3) Provide required documents, 4) Interview, 5) Sign contract, 6) Pay entry fee. Career opportunity with guaranteed monthly income.
partnerships.a2: 3 levels: 1) STARTER – CITY: 1 year, 1M FCFA entry fee, 20% of commissions, 2) BUSINESS – REGION: 2 years, 3M FCFA, 30% of commissions, 3) PREMIUM – COUNTRY: 3 years, 5-10M FCFA, 40% of commissions. See details in 'Partnerships' tab.
partnerships.a3: Dealers receive a percentage of the 5% platform commission generated in their zone: City: 20% (i.e., 1% of transactions), Region: 30% (1.5% of transactions), Country: 40% (2% of transactions). Revenue from: tickets, votes, raffles, rentals.
partnerships.a4: Depending on level: City: Representation point, local manager, active promotion, Region: Regional office, minimum 2 agents, supervision of cities, Country: National headquarters, 3-5 employees, national supervision, legal compliance. Monthly reports required.
partnerships.q5: Can I transfer my dealership to someone else?
partnerships.a5: Yes, subject to conditions: 1) Written agreement from BonPlanInfos, 2) New dealer eligible, 3) Payment of transfer fee (10% of residual value), 4) Sign amendment to contract. Priority given to buyers recommended by the outgoing dealer.
partnerships.a6: Process: Starts 3 months before expiration → Performance evaluation → Renegotiation if necessary → Sign new contract. Priority to performing dealers. Durations: City 1 year, Region 2 years, Country 3 years, all renewable.
partnerships.q7: What is the duration of dealership contracts?
partnerships.a7: Contractual durations: STARTER Contract (City): 1 year renewable, BUSINESS Contract (Region): 2 years renewable, PREMIUM Contract (Country): 3 years renewable. Territorial exclusivity guaranteed for the entire duration.
partnerships.q8: What are the advantages of being a dealer?
partnerships.a8: Key advantages: Stable monthly income, Territorial exclusivity, Complete technical support, Continuous training, Growth opportunity, Possible local office, Network of partners, Official BonPlanInfos branding.

technical.title: Technical Support and Payments
technical.q1: How do I withdraw my revenue after an event?
technical.a1: Withdrawal procedure: 1) Log in to your organizer account, 2) Go to 'My revenue', 3) Check available balance, 4) Select withdrawal method (mobile money, transfer), 5) Confirm request. Time: 24-72h depending on method.
technical.q2: What if a participant has a problem with their ticket?
technical.a2: In case of problem: 1) Participant shows QR code, 2) You scan with organizer app, 3) Check validity, 4) If valid → access granted, If invalid → contact support. In case of fraud, we refund the organizer.
technical.q3: How does QR code scanning work on the day?
technical.a3: Scan system: 1) Go to the app, 2) Log in with your organizer account credentials, 3) Select the event, 4) Scan each QR code with your phone's scanner, 5) Instant validation (valid/invalid). 100% secure feature.
technical.a4: We accept: Mobile Money (Orange Money, MTN Mobile Money, Moov Money), Bank cards (Visa, Mastercard), Bank transfers, Cash payments (via partner payment points). In development: local cryptocurrencies.
technical.q5: How do I dispute a transaction or report fraud?
technical.a5: Dispute procedure: 1) Contact support within 7 days, 2) Provide evidence (screenshots, emails), 3) Our team investigates within 72h, 4) Resolution and compensation if fraud proven. We have an intelligent anti-fraud system.
technical.a7: No, the platform is 100% online: QR code scanning (after synchronization), Ticket verification, Participant list. For sales and creations, connection required. Organizer app optimized for unstable connections.
technical.q8: What is your data privacy policy?
technical.a8: We comply with: GDPR adapted for Africa, Encrypted data, No sale to third parties, Restricted access, Right to be forgotten, Total transparency. See our complete privacy charter on the marketing page, partnership page.

data_protection.meta_description: Personal data protection policy of BonPlanInfos. Compliant with African data protection regulations.
data_protection.title: Personal Data Protection
data_protection.subtitle: Our commitment to protecting your data in Africa
data_protection.africa_compliance: Our data protection practices comply with national regulations in all operating countries in West Africa (Côte d'Ivoire, Burkina Faso, Senegal, Mali, Benin, Ghana, Nigeria), Central Africa (Cameroon, Gabon), North Africa (Tunisia, Morocco) and Southern Africa (South Africa), following both local laws and African Union standards.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.content: BonPlanInfos is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with African data protection laws. We implement robust technical and organizational measures to ensure the security and confidentiality of your information.

dpo.title: Data Protection Officer
dpo.content: Our Data Protection Officer (DPO) ensures compliance with legal and regulatory obligations regarding the protection of personal data in all African countries where we operate.

data_collected.title: Data Collected
data_collected.content: We only collect data necessary for the proper functioning of our event services:
list: Profile information: last name, first name, email, phone
Transaction data: ticket purchase history
Usage data: event preferences, interactions with the platform
Technical data: IP address, device type, essential cookies
Location data: country and city to personalize events

usage.title: Use of Data
usage.content: Your data is used strictly for the following purposes:
list: Managing registrations and participation in events
Secure processing of ticket payments
Sending confirmations and event information
Improving user experience on our platform
Compliance with African legal obligations
Personalizing event recommendations by country

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: We only share your data with:
list: Certified payment providers (MoneyFusion, PayPal, Mobile Money, Orange Money, MTN Mobile Money, Moov Money, Wave, etc.)
Event organizers (only data necessary for managing their event)
Legal authorities (upon formal request in accordance with local laws)
Technical partners under strict confidentiality agreements

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement advanced security measures compliant with African standards:
list: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmissions
Secure storage with preference for servers located in Africa
Strict access controls and multi-factor authentication
Regular security audits compliant with local laws
Encrypted backups and business continuity plans

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Your data is kept for limited periods in accordance with each country's laws:
list: Account data: 1 year after last activity
Transactional data: 1 to 2 years depending on local legal obligations
Browsing data: 13 months maximum
Event data: 1 year after the end of the event
Marketing data: 1 year after last contact

hosting.title: Data Hosting
hosting.content: Your data is mainly hosted on secure servers. We prioritize hosting solutions in Africa when possible, while guaranteeing the same quality of service and security. Our infrastructures respect the digital sovereignty requirements of the countries where we operate.

deletion.title: Right to Erasure
deletion.content: In accordance with African data protection laws, you have the right to request the deletion of your personal data. Contact our DPO at support@bonplaninfos.net for any deletion request. We commit to responding within the legal deadlines of each country.

help_center.emailDesc: Send us a detailed email and we'll respond within 24 hours
help_center.chatDesc: Join our WhatsApp group for quick answers and community support
help_center.phoneDesc: Call us directly for immediate assistance

general.title: General Questions
general.q1: How do I create an account on BonPlanInfos?
general.a1: To create an account: 1) Click 'Sign up' at the top right, 2) Fill in your personal information, 3) Verify your email, 4) Log in. It's free and takes less than 2 minutes.
general.a2: Yes, account creation and basic use are completely free. Only premium services (paid event organization, advanced promotion) may have fees. Participants only pay for the tickets they purchase.
general.q3: What types of events can I find?
general.a3: You'll find: concerts, festivals, conferences, workshops, sports events, exhibitions, parties, and more. Our platform covers all types of events in Africa.
general.a4: We accept: mobile money (Orange Money, MTN Mobile Money, Moov Money), bank cards, and transfers. Payments are secure and encrypted. You receive 95% of the amount, we take 5% commission.

organizer.title: For Organizers
organizer.q1: How do I create an event?
organizer.a1: To create an event: 1) Log in, 2) Click 'Create an event', 3) Fill in details (title, description, date, location), 4) Add photos, 5) Configure tickets and prices, 6) Publish.
organizer.q2: How do I sell tickets online?
organizer.a2: Our ticketing system allows you to: create different ticket types, set prices, limit quantities, generate unique QR codes, and track sales in real time.
organizer.q3: When and how am I paid?
organizer.a3: Payments are made within 24-72 hours after your event. You can withdraw your funds via mobile money or bank transfer from your dashboard.
organizer.a4: Yes, we offer promotion options: featured on homepage, email campaigns, targeted ads. Contact our team for more details and pricing, or click directly on the Promote button at the bottom of your event and choose the boost duration.

technical.title: Technical Support
technical.a1: If you can't log in: 1) Check your email/password, 2) Use 'Forgot password', 3) Try another browser, 4) Contact support if the problem persists.
technical.q2: How do I reset my password?
technical.a2: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page in settings, enter your email, follow the link in the received email, and create a new password.
technical.q3: Is the platform available on mobile?
technical.a3: Yes! Our site is fully responsive and works perfectly on all smartphones and tablets. No app to download.
technical.q4: What to do in case of payment error?
technical.a4: If a payment fails: 1) Do not retry immediately, 2) Check your balance, 3) Wait a few minutes and try again, 4) Contact support. We handle these cases quickly.

partnership.title: Partnerships and Licenses
partnership.q1: How do I become a dealer?
partnership.a1: To become a dealer: 1) Choose a level (City, Region, Country), 2) Contact us via email or WhatsApp, 3) Provide required documents, 4) Interview, 5) Sign the contract.
partnership.q2: What are the advantages of a partnership?
partnership.a2: As a dealer, you benefit from: stable monthly income, territorial exclusivity, complete technical support, training and growth opportunities.
partnership.a3: Entry fees vary: City (1M FCFA), Region (3M FCFA), Country (5-10M FCFA). These investments entitle you to a percentage of commissions generated in your area.
partnership.a4: Durations are: City (1 year), Region (2 years), Country (3 years). All contracts are renewable subject to performance.

legal_mentions.meta_description: Consult the legal notices of BonPlanInfos for information about the site editor, hosting and our legal obligations.
legal_mentions.title: Legal Mentions
legal_mentions.subtitle: Legal information relating to the BonPlanInfos platform.

editor.title: Site editor
editor.content: The BonPlanInfos website is published by:
editor.capital: Simplified joint stock company (SAS) with share capital between 1,000,000 and 5,000,000 FCFA
editor.address: Head office: Abidjan (Côte d'Ivoire) and Ouagadougou (Burkina Faso)

director.title: Publication Director
director.content: The publication director is Mr. S. Rayane Kibora, as President of BON PLAN INFOS (BPI).

data.title: Personal data protection
data.content1: In accordance with applicable regulations on personal data protection, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and object to your personal data. To exercise these rights, you can contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) at the following address: contact@bonplaninfos.net.
data.content2: For more information, please consult our <1>Privacy Policy</1>.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content1: The BonPlanInfos site uses cookies to improve user experience and platform performance. These cookies allow us to:
cookies.item1: Ensure the proper functioning of the site (strictly necessary cookies).
cookies.item2: Measure audience and analyze performance (analytical cookies).
cookies.item3: Offer personalized content and advertising (marketing cookies).
cookies.content2: You can at any time configure your cookie preferences via the consent banner provided for this purpose.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.content: All content on the BonPlanInfos site (texts, images, videos, graphics, logos, icons, sounds, software, source code) is protected by intellectual property laws and remains the exclusive property of BON PLAN INFOS (BPI) or its partners. Any reproduction, representation or exploitation, even partial, without prior authorization is strictly prohibited.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.content: BonPlanInfos strives to provide information as accurate as possible. However, the publisher cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the information disseminated on the platform. Use of the site is at the user's sole responsibility.

links.title: Hyperlinks
links.content: The BonPlanInfos platform may contain hyperlinks to third-party sites. BonPlanInfos has no control over these sites and disclaims all responsibility for their content or availability.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable law
applicableLaw.content: These legal notices and terms of use are governed by applicable law. Any dispute relating to their interpretation or execution will fall within the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts.

privacy.meta_description: Read our privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.p1: This privacy policy explains how BonPlanInfos collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our platform.

data_collected.title: 2. Data We Collect
data_collected.p1: We collect various information to provide and improve our services:
data_collected.item1: Account information: Name, email address, country, city, account type.
data_collected.item2: Usage data: Pages visited, interactions with events, searches performed.
data_collected.item4: Transaction data: History of coin purchases and earnings withdrawals.

data_usage.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
data_usage.item1: Provide, maintain, and improve the platform.
data_usage.item2: Personalize your experience by recommending relevant events.
data_usage.item4: Communicate with you about your account or our services.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.p1: We use cookies to ensure the proper functioning of the site, analyze our traffic, and personalize content. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time.

data_sharing.title: 5. Data Sharing
data_sharing.p1: We do not share your personal information with third parties, except when necessary to provide the service (e.g., with payment processors) or if required by law.

security.title: 6. Security
security.p1: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or destruction.

your_rights.title: 7. Your Rights
your_rights.p1: In accordance with regulations, you have the following rights:
your_rights.item1: Right of access: You can request a copy of the data we hold about you.
your_rights.item2: Right to rectification: You can correct any inaccurate information.
your_rights.item3: Right to erasure: You can request the deletion of your account and your data.
your_rights.p2: To exercise these rights, please contact us at the address below.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.p1: For any questions regarding this privacy policy, please contact us at:
